headline: Is Cummins' (CMI) Pushback on Governance Proposals Revealing a Deeper Board-Power Trade-Off?
summary: On April 2, 2026, Cummins Inc. filed its definitive proxy statement, urging shareholders to vote against proposals on reviewing its charitable giving risks and separating the Board Chair and CEO roles, ahead of the May 12 annual meeting. The shareholder push on governance and charitable spending comes just after Cummins reported robust results in its Distribution and Power Systems segments, highlighting a contrast between financial execution and investor priorities on oversight and social...
